text_block_list.name: Cafe Lady
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for waiting! Here you are! The Special
Stamina Sanzoku Fried Chicken Set with five
extra pieces and side of ginger pork!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I find Narita Brian in the cafeteria with a meal
resembling something out of a food challenge.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Ah... I feel a bit off at the moment.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I've learned from experience that whenever I'm
tired, meat's the way to go.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Once I eat meat, that usually fixes whatever's
wrong.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if this wild form of self-care really will
make her feel better.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I may want to rethink her race schedule...
